page.title: Schedules
page.bannerDescription: Trigger Agent instructions on a schedule with isolated run directories and recent execution logs.
page.emptyDescription: Create a one-off or recurring task to let the Agent run in the background.
page.emptyFilteredDescription: Try adjusting the search query or status filter.

editor.descriptionText: Set up the trigger, workspace, and Agent instruction in a more guided flow.
editor.name: Task Name
editor.nameHint: Give the task a name that is easy to recognize later.
editor.descriptionHint: Optional context about the goal or scope of the task.
editor.descriptionPlaceholder: For example: Review the latest docs and write a summary
editor.atTimeHint: Best for one-time reminders, releases, or cleanups.
editor.repeatValueHint: Enter a number like every 2 hours or every 3 days.
editor.repeatUnitHint: Choose a unit that matches how people think about this task.
editor.startAtHint: Optional. Leave empty to start counting from when the task is created.
editor.cronExprHint: Use advanced mode if you want to type the raw five-part cron expression.
editor.messageHint: Describe the objective, expected output, and any constraints.
editor.messagePlaceholder: For example: Inspect the workspace, summarize changes, and save the report to the logs folder.
editor.workingDirHint: Pick the main workspace directly instead of typing a path.
editor.workingDirPlaceholder: Click to choose a working directory
editor.openWorkingDir: Open working directory in File Explorer
editor.contextHint: Add extra folders the Agent may need for reference.
editor.agentHint: Choose the Agent persona or workflow that fits this task best.
editor.projectTemplateHint: If this task belongs to a project, pull in its directory with one click.
editor.projectWithoutDir: This project does not have a working directory yet
editor.noProjects: No projects available yet. Create one from the sidebar to reuse its working directory here.
editor.permissionHint: Set the right safety level for an automated task.
editor.missedRunPolicyHint: Choose what should happen after the app was offline or sleeping.
editor.enabledHint: Disabled tasks keep their configuration but stop triggering.

sections.basicsDescription: Start with the task name, a short goal, and which Agent should run it.
sections.scheduleDescription: Turn low-level timing fields into more natural scheduling choices.
sections.environmentDescription: Configure directories, reference folders, and safety boundaries here.
sections.messageDescription: This is the actual prompt the Agent will receive.

unitDescriptions.milliseconds: Useful for experiments or very high-frequency polling
unitDescriptions.hours: Great for digests, syncs, and reviews

hourly.title: Hourly
hourly.description: Run at the same minute of every hour

daily.title: Daily
daily.description: Run once a day at a fixed time

monthly.title: Monthly
monthly.description: Run on a specific day each month

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Enter the raw cron expression yourself

editor.calendarMinuteHint: For example, 5 means the task runs at hh:05.
editor.calendarTimeHint: Pick a specific time that feels natural.
editor.calendarWeekdaysHint: You can select multiple days, like weekdays only.

readonly.title: Read-only
readonly.description: Can inspect and analyze, but cannot change files.

safe.title: Safe
safe.description: Best for most automations, with risky operations restricted by default.

ai_review.title: AI review
ai_review.description: Lets the AI judge risk before acting. This is the most balanced default.

full.title: Full access
full.description: Best only when you fully understand what the task may do.

run_latest.title: Run latest only
run_latest.description: After recovery, execute only the most recent missed run.

run_all.title: Run all missed
run_all.description: After recovery, try to replay every missed run.

skip.title: Skip missed runs
skip.description: Ignore missed runs and wait for the next normal trigger.

prompt.title: Decide later
prompt.description: Reserved for a future confirmation-based recovery flow.

logs.title: Execution Logs
logs.description: Inspect outputs, durations, and failures for each automatic run.
logs.emptyFiltered: No logs match the current filters

validation.everyRequired: Repeat frequency must be greater than 0
validation.hourlyMinuteInvalid: Hourly schedules need a minute value between 0 and 59
validation.calendarTimeInvalid: Please choose a valid run time
validation.weeklyInvalid: Choose at least one weekday and a valid time
validation.monthlyInvalid: Choose a valid day of month and time
